items.q: Name the movie that features the character T-800.
items.explanation: T-800 is strongly linked to Terminator 2: Judgment Day.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Grand Budapest Hotel?
items.explanation: Monsieur Gustave is one of the defining characters in The Grand Budapest Hotel.

items.q: The character Cole Sear appears in The Sixth Sense.
items.explanation: Cole Sear is a key character in The Sixth Sense.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie City of God?
items.explanation: Rocket is one of the defining characters in City of God.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Mark Zuckerberg.
items.explanation: Mark Zuckerberg is strongly linked to The Social Network.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Jules Winnfield.
items.explanation: Jules Winnfield is strongly linked to Pulp Fiction.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Godfather?
items.explanation: Michael Corleone is one of the defining characters in The Godfather.

items.q: The character Ofelia appears in Pulp Fiction.
items.explanation: Ofelia appears in Pans Labyrinth, not Pulp Fiction.

items.q: Which movie features the character Billy Costigan?
items.explanation: Billy Costigan is associated with The Departed.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Trainspotting?
items.explanation: Renton is one of the defining characters in Trainspotting.
